title: impatiens nzoana subsp. nzoana
intro: Impatiens nzoana subsp. nzoana, also known as the Nzoana impatiens, is a species of flowering plant in the balsam family (Balsamaceae) native to southern Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are said to aid in the treatment of wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Impatiens nzoana subsp. nzoana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and provide relief from pain and fever. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be used to treat various ailments, or by using the plant's extracts in topical applications to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
